changelog: Mobile checkout tab navigation, PIN keypad ENT-only submission, cart overflow fixes, and responsive layout improvements.
changes: Local-first SQLite architecture with full offline capability
Ed25519 asymmetric license verification with 48-hour grace period
CRDT-based multi-device synchronization with Hybrid Logical Clocks
Admin payment approval panel with audit logging
SaaS billing portal with NayaPay proof submission
Multi-theme UI: Obsidian Emerald, Midnight Sapphire, Warm Amber, and more
FBR Tier-1 Tax compliance modes for retail and food domains
PWA installable — works on mobile and desktop
Emergency override bypass for offline Manager/Admin access
Mobile checkout tab navigation (Catalog / Cart / Payment)
PIN keypad now requires ENT button to submit — no more auto-submit on 4th digit
Cart item overflow fixed on narrow viewports
